name: myob
title: MYOB AccountRight
description: Read-only access to MYOB AccountRight Live: chart of accounts, P&L reports, employee payroll details (incl. leave balances), and wage/entitlement categories.

credentials.label: API Key
credentials.description: Shown as 'Key' on your registered app at my.myob.com.au/Bd/RegisteredApps.aspx. (OAuth2 calls this the client_id.)

credentials.label: API Secret
credentials.description: Shown as 'Secret' on the same registered-app page. (OAuth2 calls this the client_secret.)

credentials.label: Refresh Token
credentials.description: Initial OAuth refresh token. Rotates on every refresh — the running tool persists the latest value to its own writable cache.

credentials.label: Company File GUID
credentials.description: GUID of the AccountRight company file. Find via GET https://api.myob.com/accountright/ once authenticated.

myob_company_file_info.description: Sanity check + company file metadata (name, AccountRight version, last sync time)

myob_accounts.description: List the chart of accounts, optionally filtered by classification or account-number prefix

myob_pl_summary.description: Profit & Loss summary report for a single date range

myob_pl_compare.description: Profit & Loss summary for multiple periods, returned side-by-side

myob_employee_lookup.description: Find employees by first or last name; returns UIDs for drill-down

myob_employee_payroll_details.description: Full payroll record for one employee by UID: salary, hourly rate, super, tax, wage categories, leave entitlements

myob_employee_standard_pay.description: Standard (recurring) pay configuration for one employee by UID

myob_employee_leave_balance.description: Convenience: look up an employee by name and return only their assigned leave entitlements (hours and days)

myob_wage_categories.description: List of wage payroll categories (ordinary time, overtime, allowances, etc.)

myob_entitlement_categories.description: List of entitlement payroll categories (sick leave, holiday leave, long-service leave, etc.)

myob_raw_get.description: Escape hatch: GET an arbitrary AccountRight company-file path with optional query params
